name: tokscale-dashboard
description: Beautiful analytics dashboard for tracking AI coding assistant token usage and costs, built on top of the tokscale CLI.

scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.refresh: node -e "import('./scripts/data-refresh.mjs').then(m => m.runRefreshTarget(process.argv[1] || 'all', { dataDir: process.cwd() + '/data', settings: { runner: 'bunx', spec: 'tokscale@latest' }, log: console.log }))"
